title: Smelly Fruits Smiley Face Ball 20cm - Set of 5 (Uninflated) by Henbrandt
features: Smelly Balls with Smiley Faces, 20 cm
5 assorted colours, 1 of each colour supplied (blue, pink, purple, orange and red)
The balls smell of different fruity fragrances
Flat and must be used with ball pump valve before use
Suitable football pump required to fill the ball (available for purchase at b003scm5ku)
description: Directions 1. Unpack the Smelly Fruits Smiley Face Balls. 2. Use a suitable football pump (available for purchase at b003scm5ku) to inflate each ball to the desired size (20cm). 3. Close the valve on the pump to prevent air from escaping. 4. Enjoy playing with your Smelly Fruits Smiley Face Balls.
